logistics.format: Online multiple-choice (passing score 70/100). Up to 3 attempts included.

recommended_certs.rationale: ベンダ中立 IAM 資格として CIDPRO と並ぶ選択肢。両方併用で IAM の語彙を厚くする。

minus.note: IMI is not as widely recognized by hiring managers as IDPro/ISC2/Microsoft IAM credentials.

evaluation.rationale: All three personas agree at this tier; rationale reflects consensus.
